title: Vacancy for Teacher at NIT Trichy

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at NIT Trichy
jsonLd.description:
NIT Trichy, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Aurangabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NIT Trichy:
NIT Trichy is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIT Trichy!
